Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I think we need to talk to LF about how they manage their nexus.  Snapshot versions shouldn't be immediately removed when a release version is created, there needs to be a period of time after that to let components adopt the release.

Patch Set 1:

James, that sounds like the cause - nice - adding Jessica of the LF - perhaps move this to an override in onap/values.yaml for now and not directly in common

Patch Set 1:

Is this making reference to this image?
https://nexus3.onap.org/#browse/browse:docker.public:v2%2Fonap%2Fccsdk-dgbuilder-image%2Fmanifests%2F0.2.1

Patch Set 1:

Jessica, Yes the patch is changing the reference to onap/ccsdk-dgbuilder-image:0.2.1
but the root cause is to understand what happened to:

onap/ccsdk-dgbuilder-image:0.2.1-SNAPSHOT
From a search right now, it is still there but the JIRA ticket was opened because the CD system found that 0.2.1-SNAPSHOT was unavailable for a period of time.

Since the original -SNAPSHOT image is back can we abandon this patch?  The image the HEAT version uses 0.2.1-SNAPSHOT so I think that is the correct tag.

Patch Set 1:

No longer required - LF fixed nexus on the 20th
